title: Inline-action gap canonical
mechanism: grep ItemInlineAction sibling gap DS-wide — inline action 間距對齊 canonical

canonical.rule: 多個 Inline Action 並排 → 間距 gap-2 (8px),對齊 fieldWrapperStyles 元素間距
canonical.primitive_owner: packages/design-system/src/patterns/element-anatomy/item-anatomy.tsx:740 (ItemSuffix: h-[1lh] shrink-0 ml-auto flex items-center gap-2)

verified_consumers: Sidebar sidebar.tsx:1115 — flex items-center gap-2 span (multiple inlineActions)
Combobox combobox.tsx:632,811 — ItemSuffix gap-2 (clear X + chevron)
Select select.tsx:505,518,701 — clear X + chevron siblings via fieldWrapper gap-2
DatePicker date-picker.tsx:592-612 — clear X + ItemSuffix(calendar) via fieldWrapper gap-2
TimePicker time-picker.tsx:368-385 — clear X + ItemSuffix(clock) via fieldWrapper gap-2
DataTable column-visibility-panel row — drag + toggle (both ItemInlineActionButton, separated by label, row gap-2)
adversarial_checks: ItemSuffix className gap override grep → 0 hits (no primitive gap broken)
gap-1/gap-3/gap-0/!gap in inline-action host tsx → only FileViewer thumbnail/empty-state (not inline-action containers)
flex container with 2+ ItemInlineAction and gap != 2 (whole src) → 0 hits
verdict: CLEAN — inline-action sibling gap canonical (gap-2 / 8px) fully propagated DS-wide via ItemSuffix primitive + fieldWrapperStyles + Sidebar explicit gap-2. Zero drift.
